title: Rainbase Pulls the Trap Tight
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on rainbase pulls the trap tight, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Rainbase Pulls the Trap Tight. Crocodile uses Rain Dinners and Baroque Works to capture his enemies and reveal the shape of Operation Utopia. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Rain Dinners, the largest casino in Rainbase

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You think yelling is actually going to make him show up!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: He's considered the hero of Alabama right now! Are you TRYING to turn everyone here into our enemies!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Wait, hold on! If Vivi's not with us, how the hell are we supposed to recognize who Crocedile even is!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: VIVI! Croco- Dile! Where are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Sir, a strange group of people are causing a ruckus in the casino!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Tell the security to quickly deal with them.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sir! I'm afraid members of the World Govern- went are barred from Rain D-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This casino's in the middle of a lake! There's no other place for you to run to!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We're gonna have to ask you to step outside...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huh? Did I just run over something?

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Invite them into the V.I.P. room.

summary: This part develops rainbase pulls the trap tight and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
